case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. BRIAN MULKERN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-22-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MULKERN, BRIAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2014

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE OF SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; CIVL CASE COVER SHEET; DEC OF VENUE; DEC OF REDUCED FEES; ADR PACKET FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MULKERN, BRIAN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-22-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
